case_title: ICE MACHINES INCORPORATED VS AGUINAGA GERALD B IND/FDBA PIZZA DEL 6 TO MIDNIGHT et al

docket_entries.description: PLAINTIFF'S DECLARATION FILED. RE: AMENDMENT TO COMPLAINT.

MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $2,980.83 FILED BY ICE MACHINES INCORPORATED AS TO DEFENDANT AGUINAGA GERALD B IND/FDBA PIZZA DEL 6 TO MIDNIGHT AGUINAGA, SHERRY L. ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR FEB-02-2001 AT 08:30 AM IN DEPT 506

SMALL CLAIMS DISPOSITION SEP-26-2001, CONTINUED BY COURT TO APR-03-2002 AT 08:30 AM IN DEPT 506 POSSIBLE SETTLEMENT. IF THERE ARE NO PROBLEMS WITH THE SETTLEMENT, NO APPEARANCES ARE NECESSARY ON 4/3/02 AT 8:30AM, THE COURT WILL DISMISS THE ACTION WITH PREJUDICE.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: DISMISSED WITH PREJUDICE AS TO DEFENDANT AGUINAGA GERALD B IND/FDBA PIZZA DEL 6 TO MIDNIGHT AGUINAGA, SHERRY L. NON-APPEARANCE OF PARTIES. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
